name: Mix With The Masters - Justice - Producing ‘Neverender’ ft. Tame Impala
original_name: Mix With The Masters - Justice - Producing ‘Neverender’ ft. Tame Impala
overview: Justice and Kevin Parker get together to reveal the secrets behind their groundbreaking new collaboration. In this series, the producers open up about their artistic process for the very first time, sharing the tools and techniques behind their critically acclaimed single, ‘Neverender’.

trailers.title: Producing ‘Neverender’ by Justice ft. Tame Impala | Trailer
